title: desmodium terminale
intro: Desmodium terminale, also known as the Horsefly Weed or Dog Tailed Catgut, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Desmodium terminale include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Desmodium terminale is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of a paste or poultice.
